monitor_the_situation.title: — S4 · Conflict · Iran · 2m ago. A U.S. official confirms that American military strikes against Iran are underway.
Iran Launches Missiles and Drones at Kuwait and Bahrain; Air Defenses Respond
Iran Launches Drone Strikes Targeting US Fifth Fleet in Bahrain, Air Raid Sirens Sound Across Manama

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 18h ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
US Airstrike Hits School in Tehran, Kills Nearly 200
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 21h ago. A US airstrike struck a school in Tehran, killing nearly 200 children and adults, according to CNN sources, amid ongoing US strikes on Iran.
